title: ardisia triangula
intro: Ardisia triangula, also known as the Three-angled Ardisia or Three-angled Coralberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ardisia triangula include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Ardisia triangula can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional remedies in tropical regions.
